title: The Portal Vision & The May Push
mood: Grinding. Fired up. A little tired but clear.
big_idea_body: Flowmatic, TradeCraft, White Store, Olympic Paints, Flow Trader — each venture gets its own sub-dashboard. Notion synced per area. GitHub Actions and n8n buttons replace manual Claude prompts. Output flows back via Telegram or email.
reflection: The hours you've put in are not fruitless — they're infrastructure. You're building the machine that builds everything else.

entry_concepts.body: Single entry point. Status at a glance for every venture. No more tab-switching, no more remembering URLs. The portal is the home tab.
entry_concepts.title: Master Landing Page

entry_concepts.body: Each PARA area mirrored to a Notion database. Single source of truth, synced automatically. The dashboard reads from Notion; the scripts write to it.
entry_concepts.title: Notion per Area

entry_concepts.body: Daily and weekly digests styled like a control panel — not a newsletter. Buttons next to the things that matter so the inbox itself becomes a console.
entry_concepts.title: Actionable Email View

entry_concepts.body: Replace manual Claude prompts with one-click triggers. Each button hits a workflow that runs the script, ships the output, and notifies the right channel.
entry_concepts.title: Action Buttons → GitHub Actions

entry_concepts.body: Telegram for instant, email for archival, dashboard for the long view. Same data, three lenses. Pick the channel by latency required.
entry_concepts.title: Output Channels

entry_concepts.body: Click-to-trigger from the signature itself. Lowest possible friction — see something in an email, fix it from the same email.
entry_concepts.title: Email Signature Button

entry_actions.text: Portal sitemap — every venture, every script, every dashboard mapped
Notion audit — what exists, what is missing, what should be deleted
Build one action button end-to-end as proof of concept
Gmail signature template with the first action button
Eat one real meal — sit down, no screen
Mindset note: infrastructure compounds. Today's grind is tomorrow's leverage.
